Feoffment. Manors of Bodrugan, Treworek, Restronget, Tremodres, Trevelyn, Pendrym, Tretheu, Loo, Trethaek, Tredrym, Trefriek, Markwylle, Tregrehon, Carbura, Kylnodres and Poundestok

Feoffment.  Manor of Pendrym, mills of Meledrayth & Clys, etc

zh.Brixham, Torbay, Devon, England: 英國戴文托爾巴易布利哈姆
zh.Saint-Guilhem-le-Désert, Hérault, Langue: 法國藍多-盧希隆賀勞爾特沙吉吉爾姆勒-德艾瑟特
zh.lifeSummary: 當Otto de Bodrugan於1290年1月6日出生在英國可瓦爾格朗時，他的父親Henry de Bodrugan27歲，母親Sybil de Mandeville25歲。他於1307年與Margaret Champernon在英國可瓦爾結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1331年9月9日在英國戴文托特斯享年41歲，埋葬在法國藍多-盧希隆賀勞爾特沙吉吉爾姆勒-德艾瑟特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Otto de Bodrugan于1290年1月6日出生在英国可瓦爾格朗时，他的父亲Henry de Bodrugan27岁，母亲Sybil de Mandeville25岁。他于1307年与Margaret Champernon在英国可瓦爾结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1331年9月9日在英国戴文托特斯享年41岁，埋葬在法国藍多-盧希隆賀勞爾特沙吉吉爾姆勒-德艾瑟特。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Otto
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a short form of any of the various Germanic compound personal names containing the element od, ot ‘prosperity, wealth’ ( compare the corresponding Old English ēad in names such as Edward and Edwin ). St Otto of Bamberg ( d. 1139 ) was a missionary to the Pomeranians. Otto the Great ( 912–73 ) is generally regarded as the founder of the Holy Roman Empire, and the name has been borne by several members of German and Austrian royal houses. It was recorded occasionally among immigrants to England from the Low Countries in the 14th century, but failed to establish itself. Since the 19th century it has again been used occasionally in the English-speaking world, mostly among immigrants from Germanic countries.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

en.lifeSummary: When Otto de Bodrugan was born on 6 January 1290, in Gorran, Cornwall, England, his father, Henry de Bodrugan, was 27 and his mother, Sybil de Mandeville, was 25. He married Margaret Champernon in 1307, in Cornwall, England. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 9 September 1331, in Totnes, Devon, England, at the age of 41, and was buried in Saint-Guilhem-le-Désert, Hérault, Languedoc-Roussillon, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Otto de Bodrugan est né le 6 janvier 1290, à Gorran, Cornouailles, Angleterre, son père, Henry de Bodrugan, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Sybil de Mandeville, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Champernon en 1307, à Cornouailles, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 9 septembre 1331, à Totnes, Devon, Angleterre, à l’âge de 41 ans, et a été enterré à Saint-Guilhem-le-Désert, Hérault, Languedoc-Roussillon, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Otto de Bodrugan am 6. Januar 1290 in Gorran, Cornwall, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Henry de Bodrugan 27 und seine Mutter Sybil de Mandeville 25. Er hat 1307 in Cornwall, England Margaret Champernon geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 9. September 1331 im Alter von 41 Jahren in Totnes, Devon, England und wurde in Saint-Guilhem-le-Désert, Hérault, Languedoc-Roussillon, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Otto de Bodrugan è nato il il 6 gennaio 1290 nel Gorran, Cornwall, England, il suo padre, Henry de Bodrugan, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Sybil de Mandeville, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Champernon nel 1307, nel Cornwall, England. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 9 settembre 1331, nel Totnes, Devon, England, all'età di 41 anni, e fu sepolto a Saint-Guilhem-le-Désert, Hérault, Languedoc-Roussillon, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Otto de Bodruganが1290年1月6日にイギリスコルンワルゴランで生まれた時，父Henry de Bodruganは27歳，母Sybil de Mandevilleは25歳であった。1307年にイギリスコルンワルでMargaret Champernonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1331年9月9日にイギリスデボントトンスで41歳で死去し，フランスラングエドク-ロウシロンheラウルトサイント-グイルヘム-レ-ドeセルトにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Otto de Bodrugan(이)가 1290년 1월 6일 영국 코른월 고란에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henry de Bodrugan(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Sybil de Mandeville(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1307년 영국 코른월에서 Margaret Champernon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1331년 9월 9일 영국 데폰 토트네스에서 41세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 랭도c-루시런 he라트 세인트-길헤-레-드e세르트에 묻혔다.

mn.6 January 1290–9 September 1331: 1290 оны Нэгдүгээр сарын 6–1331 оны Есдүгээр сарын 9

pt.6 January 1290–9 September 1331: 6 de janeiro de 1290–9 de setembro de 1331
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Otto de Bodrugan nasceu em 6 de janeiro de 1290, em Gorran, Cornwall, Inglaterra, seu pai, Henry de Bodrugan, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Sybil de Mandeville, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Champernon em 1307, em Cornwall, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 9 de setembro de 1331, em Totnes, Devon, Inglaterra, com 41 anos, e foi sepultado em Saint-Guilhem-le-Désert, Hérault, Languedoc-Roussillon, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Otto de Bodrugan родился 6 января 1290 г. в местности горран, корнвалл, Англия, его отцу по имени Henry de Bodrugan было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Sybil de Mandeville, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Champernon в 1307 г. в местности корнвалл, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер 9 сентября 1331 г. в местности тотнесь, девон, Англия в возрасте 41 год и был похоронен в местности сеинт-гуилхем-ле-дeсирт, хeраулт, лангуедок-руссиллон, Франция.

es.6 January 1290–9 September 1331: 6 de enero de 1290–9 de septiembre de 1331
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Otto de Bodrugan nació el 6 de enero de 1290, en Gorran, Cornwall, Inglaterra, su papá, Henry de Bodrugan, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Sybil de Mandeville, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Margaret Champernon en 1307, en Cornwall, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 9 de septiembre de 1331, en Totnes, Devon, Inglaterra, a la edad de 41 años, y fue sepultado en Saint-Guilhem-le-Désert, Hérault, Languedoc-Roussillon, Francia.
